title: angelica saxicola
intro: Angelica saxicola, also known as dwarf angelica, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae), native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Angelica saxicola include its ability to alleviate fever, relieve pain, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Angelica saxicola can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
